narration: And if the evidence is weak, Black Box does not force an answer. It can return empty moments, reject low-support explanations, and keep the report narrow. The rule is simple: no evidence, no claim.

stricter_phase_modifiers.amber: desaturated #c49648 (was #ffb840), used sparingly — hairline accent + conclusion word only
stricter_phase_modifiers.rejection_mark: #aa5656 muted red, used only for strike-throughs and REJECTED tags
stricter_phase_modifiers.motion: slower 450–600ms crossfades, no stagger swarms, long holds on final card
stricter_phase_modifiers.element_count: never more than 2 primary elements on screen
stricter_phase_modifiers.negative_space: generous margins; principle card fills <40% of frame area

beats.name: candidates
beats.content: 4 real candidate hypotheses listed as neutral cards (pid_saturation, calibration_drift, other, latency_spike)

beats.name: rejection sweep
beats.content: each candidate struck through one at a time at 0.4s/1.3s/2.2s/3.1s with its real drop reason callout

beats.name: narrowed report
beats.content: single large gated_report.json card showing hypotheses: [] and the real 'No anomaly detected…' patch_proposal string

beats.name: principle
beats.content: centered 'no evidence, no claim.' + grounding thresholds subtitle, held 5s

source_assets_used: demo_assets/grounding_gate/clean_recording/raw_hypotheses.json (4 hypotheses, bug_class + confidence + summary + evidence count)
src/black_box/analysis/grounding.py (thresholds: min_confidence 0.40, min_evidence 2, min_sources 2 — reflected in subtitle)
text_overlays_used: 4 hypotheses emitted by the model · grounding gate pending
all four candidates dropped · report emitted empty
"No anomaly detected with sufficient evidence to support a scoped fix."
empty moment · insufficient evidence · narrowed report
grounding gate · min 2 evidence · min 2 sources · conf ≥ 0.40
edits_performed: real grounding-gate JSON parsed for candidate titles, confidences, evidence counts, drop reasons
beat A: neutral candidate rows, no motion, long hold
beat B: scheduled strike-through at t = 0.4 / 1.3 / 2.2 / 3.1s, right-side drop-reason callout follows most recent rejection
beat C: single gated_report.json card, amber only on the empty array line
beat D: centered principle lockup, generous whitespace, 5s hold
450–600ms smoothstep crossfades (slower than block_01/02 for clinical cadence)
remaining_work: optional: tie the 4-dot progress indicator to a full 7-block sequence map if later blocks dictate it
optional: shorten beat D hold to 4s if VO lands earlier
optional: add a tiny corner timestamp to each candidate row if the final edit wants to emphasize t_ns
